overall.description: Gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a vehicle driving through a futuristic neon-lit city. The camera follows a white sedan through urban canyons, intersections, and under elevated highways with dense cyberpunk architecture and holographic advertisements.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-lane urban street beneath elevated highway system

events.description: passes under overhead bridge structure, entering shadow

agents.ego_description: following a white sedan through the urban canyon, maintaining steady speed

notable_agents.action: white sedan driving ahead, maintaining consistent distance

entered.detail: massive concrete overpass structure spanning the roadway
tall distinctive skyscraper with geometric orange and teal facade visible in the distance
tall wall with large white asian-character graffiti markings
high-rise building with reflective glass windows

segments.scene_description: Driving through a narrow urban canyon beneath massive elevated highways, following a white sedan. The road is flanked by concrete walls with graffiti on the right and glass towers on the left, with a distinctive futuristic mega-building visible ahead in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered roadway transitioning to open intersection

events.description: exits dark tunnel section into brighter daylight at intersection approach
vehicle stops at red traffic light at intersection

agents.ego_description: slowing down and coming to a complete stop at the red light behind the white sedan

notable_agents.action: white sedan stopped at the red light ahead

entered.detail: distinctive modern building with sharp geometric yellow and gray facade
zebra crossing markings on the asphalt

segments.scene_description: Transitioning from a dark covered roadway into a brighter intersection area, the vehicle slows and stops at a red light. A distinctive yellow angular building dominates the right side, while pedestrians wait on the sidewalk corners.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy urban intersection with pedestrian crossings

events.description: pedestrians begin crossing the street in front of the vehicle
traffic light changes and vehicle accelerates through the intersection, turning right

agents.ego_description: waiting at the intersection while pedestrians cross, then accelerating through the crosswalk and turning right

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians crossing the street in front of the vehicle

entered.detail: large illuminated advertisement screen on the yellow building showing colorful graphics
tall palm trees lining the street beyond the intersection

segments.scene_description: Stopped at a busy intersection with moderate pedestrian traffic crossing in front. The vehicle waits for the light to change, then accelerates through the crosswalk, passing the yellow building with its large digital billboard, and turns right onto a new street lined with palm trees.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-level highway interchange with metal truss infrastructure

events.description: passes under distinctive metal truss structure with Cartwright street sign
stops at red traffic light under the highway overpass

agents.ego_description: driving under elevated highway structures, navigating through the interchange, and stopping at the next intersection

notable_agents.action: large box truck driving ahead and stopping at the light

entered.detail: exposed metal beam infrastructure of the elevated highway with geometric truss pattern
suspended street sign reading Cartwright with red and white text
large glowing billboard with neon pink and blue holographic display
elevated curved roadway structure with green safety barriers

segments.scene_description: Driving through a complex highway interchange beneath massive metal truss structures and elevated ramps. The vehicle passes under a Cartwright street sign and navigates past holographic billboards before stopping at a red light under the overpass, with a box truck ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement tracking a white sedan as it travels from a claustrophobic urban canyon into a bright city intersection and finally beneath a massive highway interchange. It begins beneath towering elevated highways, gliding past graffiti-covered concrete and glass towers toward a distant mega-building. As the vehicle emerges from the dark covered roadway, the scene opens into a brighter intersection where the car slows to a stop beside a prominent yellow angular building and waiting pedestrians. The camera then follows the sedan as it accelerates through the crosswalk, passing a large digital billboard before turning right onto a street lined with palm trees. Finally, the environment shifts back to a heavy industrial scale as the car navigates a complex interchange of metal truss structures and holographic billboards, eventually coming to a halt behind a box truck under a Cartwright street sign.
